_doc: Resume bullet library + resume_config fields read by resume-tailoring (skill #13) via the legacy onboarding fallback (no resume_config.json / evidence-store yet). Bullets carry stable BK-NNN ids. role_profiles maps a role tag to its default tagline and about-me. Populated 2026-06-21 from Brandon Panozzo's resume. No data here leaves this PKS repo.

bullets.text: Generated standard and ad hoc reports and finance metrics in NetSuite to support management and executive decision-making
Built and maintained annual budget and rolling forecast models in Hyperion PBCS
Led the finance team through the ERP transition from JD Edwards to NetSuite and Oracle Hyperion/PBCS, including system testing, data-integrity validation, and end-user support
Prepared monthly internal and external financial statements for the Board of Directors
Owned accurate monthly P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statements across the business
Produced monthly P&L for 15 cost centers with actual-versus-budget variance analysis for management review
Partnered with the CFO on variance-analysis presentations and supported quarterly internal audit requests
Identified process-improvement opportunities and automated month-end reporting by implementing Power Query
Served as liaison between finance end users, IT, and external vendors to research and resolve system and reporting issues
Streamlined the payroll reconciliation process for 15 cost centers, shortening the cycle by one week
bullets.metric_detail: cut cycle by one week across 15 cost centers

bullets.text: Analyzed P&L accounts at month-end to explain variances in support of the Controller
Maintained fixed-asset detail, including additions, CIP transfers, and disposals
Managed monthly, quarterly, and year-end closings under strict deadlines while mentoring junior accountants
Built the ERP account structure (chart of accounts) and integrated it with the billing module during the implementation of NetSuite and Oracle Hyperion
Closed the books and supported internal and external audits and tax filings through four ownership changes, maintaining reporting continuity across each transaction
Supplied financial data and reporting to support a KPMG company valuation tied to a sale exceeding $1 billion
Selected as one of five team members retained from a 100-person corporate finance office following acquisition by SSA Marine

about_me_versions.text: Accounting and finance professional with over 10 years of progressively responsible experience specializing in financial planning and analysis, reporting, and financial systems within a multinational organization. Proven record of leading ERP and planning-system implementations, building budget and forecast models, and turning financial data into clear insights that drive executive decision-making.

taglines.text:
Senior Financial Analyst | FP&A and Financial Systems
Budget and Forecast Modeling | Variance Analysis
Turning Financial Data into Executive Insight
taglines.use_when: FP&A, strategic finance, senior financial analyst, and financial-systems roles

finance.description: FP&A, strategic finance, senior financial analyst, and financial-systems business-partner roles
